loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

manager_no.text: ฝ่ายจัดการ

official_no.text: ผู้อนุมัติ

root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no --เลขทะเบียน ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no) as memname --ชื่อ ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type -- id หนี้ ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description --ประเภทหนี้ ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount --จำนวนเงิน ,sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve --รับสุทธิ ,sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.operate_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.operate_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY') as operate_tdate
,(select sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_approver.approver_code from sc_lon_m_loan_request,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_approver where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.approver_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_approver.approver_code )as approver_code --id ผู้อนุมัติ
,(select sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_approver.approver_desc from sc_lon_m_loan_request,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_approver where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.approver_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_approver.approver_code )as approver_desc --ชื่อผู้อนุมัติ
,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,'DD/MM/YYYY') as begining_of_contract --วันที่เริ่มสัญญา
,sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.bank_acc_no as bank_acc_no
,nvl((select sum(item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no and item_type_id = 'PL' ),0) as loan_pay --ชำระหนี้
,nvl((select sum(item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no and item_type_id = 'IS' ),0) as dep_amount --โอนเงินเข้าธนาคาร
,nvl((select sum(item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no and item_type_id = 'F17' ),0) as isu_amount --ค่าเบี้ยประกัน
,sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status --จ่ายแล้ว ,sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status --หักกลบไปแล้ว ,sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name
,pka_hr.fp_get_hr_name( '!official_no!' ) as approve_name ,pka_hr.fp_get_hr_position_by_offno( '!official_no!' ) as approve_position
,pka_hr.fp_get_hr_name( '!manager_no!' ) as manager_name ,pka_hr.fp_get_hr_position_by_offno( '!manager_no!' ) || decode( '!manager_no!' , '0041' , '' , ' รักษาการแทน ' ) as manager_position ,decode( '!manager_no!' , '0041' , '' , ' ผู้จัดการ' ) as manager_position_2
FROM sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_addloan ,sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_cnt_m_coop
WHERE sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_addloan.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status = '1' --จ่ายแล้ว
/*WHERE*/
order by sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ,sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no
